Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-25-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, Reporter: B. Fields, CSR #7235

Craig Breitman, Esq. for plaintiff Selman Breitman LLP.
Plaintiff's Witness: Craig Breitman was placed under oath and direct examined.
Default has been entered against the defendant.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff, and against the Defaulted Defendant Dennis Griffin for Judgment as follows:

Damages - $137,051.87
Costs - $550.00
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
